title: Hangrix host repo agents.yml
description: Schema for .hangrix/agents.yml. Mirrors the strict-decode contract enforced by internal/agentsconfig: unknown keys, duplicate role keys, and out-of-range values are all rejected by the runtime parser.

version.description: Schema version. Only 1 is currently accepted.

roles.description: Map of role-key to Role. At least one role is required.

propertyNames.description: Role keys match the mention-protocol grammar: lowercase alnum + dash, 1-39 chars, starts with a letter.

container.description: Runtime environment shared by every role. Exactly one of `image` or `build` must be set.

image.description: Fully-qualified registry pull spec, e.g. ghcr.io/acme/dev:1.2.3.

dockerfile.description: Repo-relative path to the Dockerfile; conventionally .hangrix/agent.Dockerfile.

context.description: Build context root, repo-relative. Defaults to repo root when omitted.

args.description: Build-arg map passed to `docker build --build-arg`. String values only.

env.description: Plain-text env vars injected into every role container. Keys uppercase `[A-Z_][A-Z0-9_]*`.

secrets.description: Name-only list of secrets the platform injects from the repo's secrets settings. Values never appear in this file.

volumes.description: Repo-scoped named caches bind-mounted into the container.

name.description: Platform-scoped identifier (e.g. pnpm-store). Runner namespaces by repo id automatically.

mount.description: Absolute path inside the container. `..` segments are rejected.

llm.description: LLM tuning block. Appears at team level (top-level llm:) and per-role; role-level overrides team, team overrides platform default. The parser refuses an empty model — an llm block with no model is a misconfiguration, not 'use defaults'.

model.description: Model name; must appear in some provider's allowed_models at runtime.

reasoning_effort.description: Thinking intensity. OpenAI-compat adapters pass it through; the Anthropic adapter translates to thinking.budget_tokens (minimal/low → 1024, medium → 4096, high → 16384) and drops temperature. Empty string is equivalent to omission.

max_context_tokens.description: Agent runtime cap on prompt + conversation-history tokens before truncation. 0 = no cap declared here.

max_output_tokens.description: Per-call output budget (Anthropic max_tokens, OpenAI max_output_tokens). 0 = let the upstream apply its default.

temperature.description: OpenAI-style sampling temperature. Dropped by the Anthropic adapter when thinking is enabled.

role.description: One agent role. Must declare at least one trigger and exactly one of `prompt` or `prompt_file`.

triggers.description: Event subscription map (GitHub Actions style). Keys are recognised trigger constants; values are the per-event filter block (empty mapping `{}` = no filter). No wildcards.

can.description: Platform tool whitelist. Tools not listed here are invisible via tools/list and rejected on tools/call.

not.description: Platform tool blacklist; only consulted when `can` is empty. When both `can` and `not` are set, `can` wins and `not` is ignored.

scope.description: Soft path-glob hint injected into the role's prompt; not enforced by pre-receive.

prompt.description: Inline system prompt. Mutually exclusive with prompt_file.

prompt_file.description: Repo-relative path to the prompt body. Must start with `.hangrix/prompts/` and not contain `..`.

triggerFilterless.description: Filter block for triggers that take no parameters. Must be null or an empty mapping; any property is a misconfiguration.

triggerCommentFilter.description: Filter block for `issue.comment`. All fields default to no-filter; AND-combined when set.

mentioned_only.description: When true, the role fires only if its own key is in the comment's @agent-<key> mention list.

from_roles.description: Fires only for comments posted by an agent whose role key is in this list.

from_users.description: Fires only for comments posted by a human user whose platform login is in this list.

triggerPushFilter.description: Filter block for `commit.pushed`. AND-combined when both lists are set. Glob semantics mirror GitHub Actions / doublestar.

paths.description: Include globs. Push wakes the role only if at least one changed file matches at least one pattern.

paths_ignore.description: Ignore globs. Push wakes the role only if at least one changed file is NOT covered by these patterns (every-file-ignored push is skipped).
